title: BEM-860 route after 859
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 08:41 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem859_verify_response_after_bem858.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if ps=='real_response_found':
    status='route_process_real_response'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and produce agreed protocol'
elif ps=='response_missing_queue_remaining':
    status='route_tick_queue_remaining'
    next_action='fresh tick because queue still contains pending response item'
elif ps=='response_missing_runtime_seen':
    status='route_diagnose_provider_response_writer'
    next_action='diagnose Claude action outcome/provider and response writer'
elif ps=='response_missing_runtime_absent':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem860_claude_runtime_repair_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-860 runtime absent after response retry; dispatch Claude dispatcher again','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='route_requeue_runtime_repair'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify runtime state'
else:
    status='route_unknown_bem859_status'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-859 status'
state={'bem':'BEM-860','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem860_route_after_bem859.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem860_route_after_bem859.md').write_text('# BEM-860 | Route After BEM-859 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem860_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. commit_sha null ignored.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-860'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem860_route_after_bem859.json','governance/reports/bem860_route_after_bem859.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem860_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-859 response verification and queued runtime repair retry if runtime remained absent')
